titleStmt.title: SII 34.433: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 433. Tiruvāḍānai, Tiruvadanai Taluk, Ramanathapuram District. On the main gōpura of the Ādiratnēśvara temple, right of entrance.

summary.p: Sētupatidēvar, Śaka 1557, Yuva, Tai 14, sudi paurṇami, Pushya = A.D. 1636, January 12.

This records an order of Tirumalaiyaṉ, for the merit of the king Sētupatidēvar, that nobody should misappropriate the income from the temple villages in possession of the temple of Āḍāṉai-Nāyakar. In the imprecation it is warned that anybody who dares to indulge in taking bride (kaikkūli) in these villages would be abused of surrendering his wife, niece and daughterin-law to his enemies.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cakātta
m 1000 5 100 5 10 7 Ita
ṉ mēl cellāniṉ
ṟa yuva varuṣam tai mātam 10 4 §
pūṟuva pakkattil
pauṟuṉaiyum pū
canaṭcattiṟamum
peṟṟa puṇṇiyakā
lattil cuvāmi Ā
ṭāṉai nāyakāṟku
cētupatit tēvar
puṇṇiyamākat
tirumalaiyaṉ kaṭ
ṭaḷaiyiṭṭa paṭi
yiṉ nayinār kō
vil tīttan tiṟunīṟu
cāttuppoṭi tiru
mālai Aruḷippā
ṭu taḻukaippiṟacā
tamum peṟuvatallā
mal kōvil kirāma
ṅkaḷil piṟavakai
Orukācu Orupaṇa
m kala nellu Uḷpa
ṭa cuvāmikku muta
liṭāmal Eṭuttavaṉ
keṅkaikkaraiyi
lē kārāmpacuvai
yum mātāpitāvai
yum kuruvaiyum
koṉṟa tōṣa
ttilē pōkak
kaṭavārākavum
Intak kirāmaṅkaḷi
lē kaikūli vāṅ
kiṟavaṉ peṇṭāṭṭi
yum Uṭappiṟantāṉ
makaḷaiyum marumaka
ḷaiyum yivarkaḷai
Oruvīṭṭilē cattu
ruvuṭaṉē kūṭṭikkuṭu
ttu campōkam paṇ
ṇu
Digital edition of SII 34.433 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
